description_long: This is a modern single-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The front facade features a small porch with steps, a wooden privacy fence, and a prominent entryway. Large windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light to the main living areas. The house includes a mix of open-plan and segmented rooms, with visible interior furnishings and fixtures in the main living space. The exterior is finished in a combination of white and gray materials, with wood accents adding warmth to the design. A detached garage or auxiliary structure is positioned adjacent to the main building.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, asymmetrical windows, and a wood-accented entryway. Includes a detached auxiliary structure and a clean, minimalist exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, porch, wooden fence, and large windows, with the detached structure visible to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, segmented room layout, and the proximity of the detached structure to the main house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back rooms, less window coverage, and the detached structure positioned behind the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's length, flat roof, and the relationship between the main building and the detached structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, wooden privacy fence, and a modern door with minimal overhang.
